summary: All requested features verified working. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 features tested successfully - emoji display fixed, translation on click works, smart polling preserves state, language selector works, theme toggle works.

accessibility_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

react_warnings.issue: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (BrowserRouter/LoginPage)
react_warnings.note: Known issue from previous iteration - not blocking functionality

tests: Translation endpoint requires auth (401 without token) ✓
GET /api/conversations/conv_1fdb73670c42/messages returns messages with emoji_content field ✓
No diamond placeholders (◆) in emoji content ✓

web_login_flow.details: Login form fills correctly, clicking Sign In redirects to /chat

web_emoji_display.details: Emojis display correctly in chat messages and sidebar. NO diamond ◆ symbols. Uses [...string] spread operator for Unicode.

web_click_to_reveal_translation.details: Clicking emoji message shows: 1) Eye icon + translated text, 2) 'Translated' indicator, 3) Original text below. Example: Bulgarian 'хей' → English 'hey' with original shown below

web_language_selector.details: Language dropdown in top-right shows: English, Bulgarian, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Russian, Turkish. Currently selected language has checkmark.

web_theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle switches between light/dark mode. Tested 5 rapid clicks with no flickering.

web_smart_polling_preserves_state.details: After clicking to reveal a message, waited 6 seconds (3 polling cycles). Reveal state preserved - 'Translated' indicator and eye icon still visible.

critical_code_review_comments: EmojiRevealCard.jsx correctly uses [...string] instead of split('') for Unicode emoji handling (line 58)
ChatLayout.jsx smart polling only updates if message count or last message ID changed (lines 99-106)
Translation happens on-demand via POST /api/translate when user clicks to reveal (lines 30-46)
Mobile MessageBubble.tsx has proper tap-to-reveal with translation integration
seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation conv_1fdb73670c42 with emoji messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new emoji/translation features verified working. Key implementations: 1) EmojiRevealCard uses [...string] for proper Unicode handling (no more diamond symbols), 2) On-demand translation via /api/translate when clicking to reveal, 3) Smart polling in ChatLayout preserves reveal/translation state by only updating if messages actually changed. Minor React warning in LoginPage about setState during render is unrelated to new features.
tests_passed: Backend: No diamond placeholders in emoji content
Backend: Languages endpoint returns supported languages
Frontend: Login flow works and redirects to /chat
Frontend: Emojis display correctly (no diamond symbols)
Frontend: Click to reveal shows translated text + original
Frontend: Theme toggle rapid click (no flickering)
Frontend: Smart polling preserves reveal state
